name: Martian Rocks
description: Common Martian stones are wildly popular on Earth.

name: Martian Foods
description: These food kits, dubbed 'Martian Foods' can be bought from Mars and sold anywhere in the system.

name: Water
description: Exported from Earth, water is needed by everyone.

name: Energy Cell
description: These small, common energy cells are used everywhere in the system and can be purchased from Earth, Mars, and Mercury.

name: Miscellaneous Garbage
description: An assortment of things that no one wants. However, vendors on Gem seem to still purchase them for some reason.

name: Jupiter Gas
description: A unique blend of gas syphoned from the gas giant, Jupiter Gas is used to power the Supercharged Fuel Cell factory on Mercury.

name: Eris Ice
description: Super-frozen ice from Eris is somehow used in mod crafting.

name: Iron Ore
description: A crate of Iron in its natural, unrefined state. Used in the construction of mods and available from Mars.

name: Tungsten Plate
description: Tungsten is the hardest non-alloy metal known.

name: Heavy Water
description: This solution is used in the construction of mods and can be purchased from Earth.

name: Silica Gem
description: These dazzling green gems are primarily used in the construction of mods.

name: Titanium
description: This alloy is used in the construction of mods.

name: Heavy Titanium
description: This thick alloy is used in the construction of mods and can be purchased on Mars.

name: Compacted Iron Ore
description: Very heavy, and ultra-compacted, this ore is sold from Mars.

name: Hydrogen
description: Hydrogen is one of Gemini Station's primary power sources and is used in the production of some mods.

name: Mercurium
description: An exotic chemical with outrageously destructive properties. Used almost exclusively in the production of mods.

name: Polished Diamond
description: These pristine diamonds from Eris are almost always used in the production of mods.

name: Small Helium Canister
description: These compact canisters are ideal for shipping small amounts of Helium.

name: Black Ice Shards
description: These small, shards of ice from Eris are primarily used for crafting mods.

name: Tier I Mod Component
description: Used in the construction of level 100 mods.

name: Tier II Mod Component
description: Used in the construction of level 200 mods.

name: Tier III Mod Component
description: Used in the construction of level 300 mods.

name: Tier IV Mod Component
description: Used in the construction of level 400 mods.

name: Tier V Mod Component
description: Used in the construction of level 500 mods.

name: Tier VI Mod Component
description: Used in the construction of exceptionally rare level 600 mods.

name: Supercharged Fuel Cell
description: These extremely valuable supercharged cells can be used to refill your ship's energy and processor reservers.

name: General Trade Goods
description: These are basic necessities needed by everyone everywhere.

name: Synthplast
description: This Nanite-based adhesive is used for various mod projects.

name: Anti-Gravity Components
description: Used mostly on Eris for their gravity experiments, these large crates of components fetch a high price when in stock.

name: Targeting Chips
description: Primarily used in the construction of weapon mods, these miniaturized targeting chips are also used to assist gas harvest drones on Jupiter.

name: Micro Shield Generators
description: These small shield generators are primarily used in mod construction.

name: Empty Gas Cylinders
description: Jupiter requires a steady stream of these empty gas cylinders to maintain the gas export quotas.

name: Disrupter Cartridges
description: Disrupters are highly illegal. But their cartridges are used by gas farmers on Jupiter.

name: Empty Shipping Containers
description: These empty shipping containers can be sold exclusively to Jupiter.

name: Mining Grenade
description: These hand-sized charges are primarily used for clearing stubborn ice veins on Eris...and are sometimes thrown at unsuspecting enemies.

name: Radiation Suits
description: These emergency suits protect wearers from harmful amounts of radiation. They are typically used on Mars.

name: Acetylene Tanks
description: These canisters of combustible gas are produced by Jupiter and can be sold to Eris or used in mod construction.

name: Sensor Packs
description: Sensor packs are in high demand anywhere mods are built or sold. They are also used in the construction of mods.

name: General Purpose Scanner
description: These hand-held scanners can be purchased from Earth or Eris and are used across the system.

name: Maintenance Kit
description: These Terran-made kits are needed throughout the system.

name: Space Moth Traps
description: Known as the scourge of space, Space Moths prey on unsuspecting ships, draining their power. These traps might help capture them.

name: Military Grade Mod Frame
description: Produced by Mars, these mod frames are used in the construction of mods.

name: Commercial Grade Mod Frame
description: Produced by Earth, these mod frames are used in the construction of mods.

name: Medical Supplies
description: Standard medical supplies are primarily needed in more remote locations.

name: Gemini Supply Crate
description: When opened, this crate will award the pilot direct travel, 1-3 Supercharged Energy Cells, up to $25,000, and supporter status for 30 days. Can be purchased from other players in the auction house or for $5 USD here.

name: Captured Space Moths
description: A Space Moth Trap filled with captured Space Moths! I wonder if anyone on Eris would have a use for this?

name: Moon Rocks
description: White rocks taken from the surface of the moon.

name: Ship Transponder
description: This item can only be acquired by defeating other pilots in combat.

name: Framed Picture of Pancake
description: [hiss]

name: Medal of Peace
description: This emblem was awarded to all surviving participants of The Great Civil War. It was meant to to serve as a reminder that we are Terran or Martian, but human.

name: Contraband
description: A collection of illegal goods.

name: Mothite
description: A highly combustable substance made from dehydrated, ground space moths.

name: Blue Methane
description: Harvested exclusively from Neptune's atmosphere, this gas is used in mod constrcution, and can be sold to most locations.

name: Experimental Mod Frame
description: Produced by on the isolated labratory on Sedna.

name: Space Cloth
description: This durable cloth can withstand the harsh vacuum of space.

name: Black Matter
description: Highly unstable and mysterious material was created in a laboratory far from the inner system

name: Rock Dust
description: Dust from rocks.

name: Gemstones
description: A miscellaneous selection of precious gems.

name: Asteroid Fragments
description: Bits and pieces of broken astroids. These are typically used in fabrication projects.

name: Sludge
description: A combination of several types of filth.

name: Weapon Parts
description: A collection of random weapon parts. This item is typically used in the construction of mods and in fabrication bluprints.

name: Seeker Weapon Parts
description: Various components for a seeker weapons mod. This is a mission item.

name: Damaged Data Core
description: A damaged data core from an unresponsive cargo drone.

name: Refined Sludge
description: Toxic sludge in its refined state. It might not be completely toxic anymore, but is not safe for human consumption...especially on an empty stomach.

name: Exotic Material
description: An unexplained, exotic material salvaged from a mysterious, derelict ship.

name: Marsite
description: A deadly, highly radioactive material found on Mars.
